hero.sub:
Bridging technology and creativity
Engineer · Creator · Educator

engineer.title: Engineer
engineer.subtitle: 6 years · Business systems / AI
engineer.intro: I build business systems with GAS (Google Apps Script) and Google Workspace, and develop AI-powered products. My experience also extends to research-driven system development, including a joint research project with a university.

highlights.title: Attendance Management System
highlights.desc: A clock-in/clock-out system combining GAS, Spreadsheet, and Google Forms. Automates everything from time stamping to aggregation.

highlights.title: Consultation Records System
highlights.desc: A system for managing consultation records of psychiatric patients. Streamlines storing, organizing, and referencing records.

highlights.title: Restaurant Reservation System
highlights.desc: A lightweight reservation and booking management system for small restaurants.

highlights.title: Manual Assistant Chatbot
highlights.desc: An AI chatbot that answers questions based on operation manuals.

highlights.title: SP Record Database System
highlights.meta: AI · Joint research with Kyushu University
highlights.desc: An AI-powered database system for SP (standard play) records, developed as a joint research project with Kyushu University.

video.title: Video Editing
video.subtitle: 4 years · YouTube / SNS
video.intro: Four years of video editing experience, mainly with DaVinci Resolve; also proficient with Premiere Pro. My work ranges from YouTube variety videos to university seminar introduction videos.

highlights.title: YouTube Variety Videos
highlights.desc: Produced variety videos for YouTube with editing focused on pacing and watchability.

highlights.title: University Seminar Introduction Video
highlights.desc: Produced a university seminar introduction video, handling structure and editing to match the project's goals.

design.title: Design
design.subtitle: 3 years · Print / Digital / Web
design.intro: A visual designer based in Victoria, Australia. I focus on poster design, digital illustrations, and branding visuals with a touch of Japanese minimalism and bold color. I also design and build websites.

highlights.title: Leaflet — "Seminar Exhibition at Teikyo University 2024"
highlights.desc: An exhibition leaflet for the Nagai seminar at Teikyo University. Designed to bring out the colors of four different exhibition themes while keeping the whole cohesive.

highlights.title: Illustration × Photography — "Light of Longing"
highlights.desc: A 2A0-sized poster for the renewal of a museum café. Combined my own photo of the first sunrise of 2024 with a hand-drawn phoenix, leaving the bottom right empty to express an unbalanced sense of unreality.

highlights.title: Poster — "Gyusuki Udon"
highlights.desc: A menu poster for Ginza Suehiro Cafeteria Services. Expressed sukiyaki as a winter delicacy with a snowy mountain backdrop while emphasizing a student-friendly price.

highlights.title: Poster — "Hachioji Mulberry Gelato"
highlights.desc: A poster for a collaboration product with Michi-no-Eki Hachioji Takiyama. Botanical ornamentation conveys the texture of local Hachioji mulberries and a sense of place.

highlights.title: Recipe Card
highlights.desc: A cooking recipe card, balancing an approachable, friendly feel with clear, readable information design.

highlights.title: Website — "Nagai Seminar, Teikyo University"
highlights.desc: The official website, commissioned by the Nagai seminar at Teikyo University. The motion-rich design was well received.

highlights.title: Website — "Hair Salon EMU"
highlights.desc: The official website for a hair salon, designed around a chic Japanese style with watercolor-processed sunflower photos reflecting the owner's taste.

education.title: Education
education.subtitle: 4 years · Cram School Instructor
education.intro: Four years of teaching experience as a cram school instructor, with a school teaching license. Under the school's internal certification system, I qualified to teach every subject from elementary through high school — except second-year high school physics — and taught a wide range of grades and subjects.

highlights.title: Cram School Instructor
highlights.desc: Under a system requiring internal certification for each class, qualified to teach all subjects except second-year high school physics, teaching students from elementary through high school.

highlights.title: School Teaching License
highlights.desc: Holds a school teaching license, grounding instruction in formal teaching expertise.

highlights.title: Original Teaching Materials
highlights.desc: Created original math and English teaching materials. Sample materials are available.

food.title: F&B
food.subtitle: 3+ years · Service / Management / Cooking
food.intro: Hall service and management experience at a university cafeteria, plus cooking experience at a Japanese restaurant in Australia. I can handle everything from customer service to operations and cooking.

highlights.title: University Cafeteria — Hall Staff / Manager
highlights.desc: Beyond hall service, proposed new menu items roughly once a month and handled the related management and promotional work.

highlights.title: Japanese Restaurant Cook (Australia)
highlights.desc: Skilled in standard restaurant cooking, and can also properly prepare sushi.

about.label: ABOUT
about.title: Takuho Nagoya
about.body: Born in Kanagawa, Japan. I work across engineering, video editing, design, education, and hospitality — bridging technology and creativity across disciplines. Now based in Victoria, Australia, I document everyday scenes through photography and design.
about.caption: Based in Victoria, Australia

quote.text: Crossing the boundaries of disciplines, bridging technology and creativity.
